title: Sidebar Workspaces Tree
description: Studio UI for **Sidebar Workspaces Tree**: user-visible layout and actions driven exclusively through `SpecdDataPort` hooks. Studio UI component: **Sidebar Workspaces Tree**.
context: Studio UI for **Sidebar Workspaces Tree**: user-visible layout and actions driven exclusively through `SpecdDataPort` hooks. Studio UI component: **Sidebar Workspaces Tree**.

rules.requirement: sidebar renders global poll data and wires actions
rules: The sidebar MUST render lists from global poll hooks (`hooks-changes-collection`, `hooks-workspaces-specs`, etc.). Workspaces MUST be grouped using shadcn **`Card`** components. Rows MUST be implemented using shadcn **`Button`** (variant ghost). Row actions (open, restore, discard) MUST call the appropriate mutate port methods.

rules.requirement: rows must truncate long spec paths
rules: Each workspace and spec row MUST support text truncation ("...") when the sidebar width is constrained, using flexbox-based `min-w-0` and `truncate` rules applied to the button and its children.
Components MUST consume data through `SpecdDataPort` hooks and MUST NOT import `@specd/core`.

rules.requirement: view surfaces loading and error states
rules: While requests are in flight or fail, the UI MUST show loading indicators and human-readable errors (including HTTP 409 on save conflicts where applicable).

scenarios.requirement: sidebar renders global poll data and wires actions
scenarios.name: Sidebar lists refresh on global poll
then: AND row actions stay wired to ports

scenarios.requirement: sidebar renders global poll data and wires actions
scenarios.name: Open action calls read port
when: user clicks open on a change row

scenarios.requirement: sidebar renders global poll data and wires actions
scenarios.name: Discard calls mutate port
when: user discards a draft from sidebar

scenarios.requirement: rows must truncate long spec paths
scenarios.name: Long spec paths truncate
given: a spec with a deeply nested path exceeding sidebar width
then: AND full path is visible via native browser tooltip

scenarios.name: Component consumes SpecdDataPort hooks only
when: UI package dependency graph is inspected

scenarios.name: Hook delegates to configured adapter
when: component mounts and requests change data
then: AND no direct repository or kernel import

scenarios.name: Adding a core import fails the boundary
then: AND data must flow through the port surface

scenarios.requirement: view surfaces loading and error states
scenarios.name: Hook exposes loading while port call is in flight
when: port method is invoked from the component
then: consumers observe loading state until the promise settles

scenarios.requirement: view surfaces loading and error states
scenarios.name: Failed fetch shows human-readable error
given: port returns a network or HTTP error
then: AND UI renders the message instead of stale data

scenarios.requirement: view surfaces loading and error states
scenarios.name: Save conflict shows HTTP 409 to the user
when: inspector save hook completes with error
then: AND editor buffer is not silently replaced
